response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TypeScript, Node.js, and software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD). Recent role at re:cinq touches MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling, which aligns with the JD. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, and cloud-native AI on AWS/GCP/Azure — the core technical pillars of this Staff FDE role. Customer-facing technical leadership experience is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js background with 13+ years across diverse domains
Recent hands-on exposure to MCP and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
Proven software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, teaching/mentoring via workshops
concerns: No demonstrated production RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation pipeline experience
Limited evidence of major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) AI system design at scale
No clear customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting experience

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling exposure at re:cinq
